subcodes.first_line: In this day the clouds of oppression have veiled the rays of the Sun of Justice, and outward means have led the heedless astray [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: امروز سحاب ظلم انوار آفتاب عدل را ستر نموده و اسباب ظاهره غافلین را بشانی
subcodes.subjects: @goodly deeds; actions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @power of prayer
